tasks.title: Local Supervisor Maintenance
tasks.rationale: Ensures the local registry and morning report reflect the latest Cover Gate closures and Gemini API status.

tasks.title: Repair Live eBay Cover Mismatch

tasks.title: Etsy Digital Pilot Audit
tasks.rationale: Verify if the first $2.00 spend generated any organic signal (views/favs) before scaling the next batch.

tasks.title: eBay Traffic Diagnosis
tasks.rationale: Analyze why 43/50 listings show 0 views despite 2% ads; identifies if the issue is SEO intent or technical suppression.

tasks.title: Printify Production Design Audit
tasks.rationale: Visual QA check to ensure local design files match the Printify print area before any new publishing.
